query:
CREATE TABLE `aptitude_analyses` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`surveyAnswers` json,
	`radarData` json,
	`recommendedMajors` json,
	`analysisText` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `aptitude_analyses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
